Escape Plan
Ground-level intelligence

Know Before Everyone Else.

Hidden gems before they blow up. Cheap neighborhoods everyone else misses. Expat hubs where your tribe already lives. Places about to 2x in price.

🇧🇬

Plovdiv, Bulgaria

Hidden city
Discovery heat72/100
$600–$900/mo
90-day free (EU candidate)

Europe's oldest city. Beautiful old town. Thriving art scene. Under-the-radar for expats.

HistoryArt sceneUltra cheapPre-EU prices
🇲🇪

Kotor, Montenegro

Coastal gem
Discovery heat68/100
$900–$1,400/mo
90-day free

Medieval walled city on the Adriatic. Cheaper than Dubrovnik. Growing digital nomad scene.

Medieval townAdriatic seaGrowing sceneUnderpriced
🇲🇽

Bacalar, Mexico

Nature escape
Discovery heat81/100
$700–$1,200/mo
180-day tourist

"Lake of Seven Colors" — stunning lagoon town. Zero crowds vs Tulum. Ultra chill.

Turquoise lakeNo crowdsPre-boomNature paradise
🇬🇪

Kutaisi, Georgia

Ancient city
Discovery heat59/100
$450–$700/mo
365-day free

Georgia's 2nd city. Ancient monasteries. Cheapest entry point in Europe. Almost zero tourists.

Ultra cheapNo touristsAncient history365-day free visa
🇨🇴

Medellin Side Towns

Suburb escape
Discovery heat75/100
$600–$900/mo
90-day free

El Retiro, Envigado, Sabaneta — Medellín lifestyle at 40% lower price. Colombian middle-class neighborhoods.

El RetiroEnvigadoSabanetaLocal feel
🇲🇦

Taroudant, Morocco

Ancient medina
Discovery heat48/100
$400–$700/mo
90-day free

Called "little Marrakech" but 10x cheaper and authentic. Walled city, souks, no tourists.

Ancient medinaUltra authenticNo touristsCheapest Morocco
